variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 12587 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 12587 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 12587 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 102.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 62.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 71.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 53.0 mm

variants.title: Mann Filter C 11 008 Ventilator | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 12587
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter C 11 008 Ventilator | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 12587
variants.description: For over 70 years, MANN-FILTER has been synonymous with premium filters in original equipment quality worldwide. Benefit from a comprehensive product range and optimum filtration performance to protect drivers, engines and machinery. In the familiar yellow-green packaging, MANN-FILTER offers innovative solutions to new filtration challenges and produces on a global scale in accordance with the latest international production and test standards in the automotive industry.
specifications: Style: Ventilator, Dimension A: 106.0 mm, Dimension B: 63.0 mm, Dimension H: 74.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P500196 Breather, Hydraulic | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 12587
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P500196 Breather, Hydraulic | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 12587
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P500196 Breather, Hydraulic is designed to provide reliable performance in breather, hydraulic applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF26455 Air Filter Breather | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 12587
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF26455 Air Filter Breather | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 12587
variants.description: Fleetguard® AF26455 air breather is designed to filter out contaminants before they reach your engine.
